results.rendered_html:
apagam 1 P.
1 To go away, depart; pass away, elapse (as time);  K. 73 ; tanmukhācchāyāpagatā  H. 3 ; saṃpado nāpagacchaṃti  Pt. 3. 8. 
2 To fall off or down; go away, vanish, disappear.
